events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. Reversed polarity is a hot/neutral termination defect (violates NEC 406.4/406.9) that creates a shock hazard and can compromise GFCI/AFCI protection required by 210.8. Since the work is only rough-complete, it's correctable now — corrective action is re-terminating with correct polarity and retesting before cover-up/energization.
